{{Infobox concept
| name = Eledari Pact
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Eledari [[Pact]] is a fundamental cosmic agreement that restricts the actions of the [[Abidan]]. It serves as a barrier preventing these entities from interfering with or altering the destiny and [[fate]] of healthy [[Iterations]]. Under this pact, even powerful figures are prohibited from intervening in worlds to prevent corruption or disasters if doing so would violate the established course of [[fate]]. While most agents are bound by these restrictions, certain specialized roles, such as the proposed [[Executor program]], aim to create individuals who can operate without being constrained by the pact, allowing them to eliminate apocalyptic threats at their source without warping reality or violating the agreement.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Makiel]] led the opposition to all of [[Ozriel]]'s proposed modifications to the [[Eledari Pact]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Eledari Pact]] prevents [[Abidan]] from changing the destiny of a healthy [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] was an agent of the [[Abidan]] but was not bound to the [[Eledari Pact]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]] was bound by the [[Eledari Pact]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Eledari Pact]] is a rule or agreement that must not be violated.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Makiel]] accuses [[Ozriel]] of violating the [[Eledari Pact]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
